subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, be thou happy, for hearts are cheered by thy remembrance and souls are gladdened by thy mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق خوش باش که دلها بیاد تو خوش است و جانها بذکر تو مسرور این ارتباط
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement
